mapper.insert: INSERT INTO private_msg_content (from_id, to_id, content, create_time, message_type_id, conversation_id,service_domain_id, state) VALUES (#{fromId}, #{toId}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{messageTypeId}, #{conversationId},#{serviceDomainId},#{state})
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.from_id, m.to_id, m.content, m.create_time, m.message_type_id, m.conversation_id, m.state, u.nickname as fromName, u.user_profile as fromProfile FROM private_msg_content m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.from_id = u.id LEFT JOIN private_chat_conversation c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE (c.user_id_1 = #{userId} OR c.user_id_2 = #{userId}) -- 只能查最近3天 AND m.service_domain_id = #{serviceDomainId} AND ( -- A. 只要是已结束的，谁的都能看 c.is_active = 0 OR -- B. 只要是我参与的，不管结束没结束（进行中），都能看 (c.user_id_1 = #{currentId} OR c.user_id_2 = #{currentId}) ) AND ( -- A. 正常聊天消息：发送者 != 接收者 (这就自然排除了“用户的自发系统消息”) m.from_id != m.to_id OR -- B. 特殊豁免：如果是“我(当前客服)”自己发给自己的系统消息，我要看！ (m.from_id = #{currentId} AND m.to_id = #{currentId}) ) AND m.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC, m.id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT from_id FROM private_msg_content WHERE to_id = #{userId} AND state = 0

SELECT m.id, m.from_id, m.to_id, m.content, m.create_time, m.message_type_id, m.conversation_id, m.state, CASE WHEN m.message_type_id = 6 THEN c.score END as score FROM private_msg_content m LEFT JOIN user u_from ON m.from_id = u_from.id LEFT JOIN user u_to ON m.to_id = u_to.id LEFT JOIN private_chat_conversation c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE ( ( -- 情况1: 我(用户)发给客服 -> 接收者(u_to)必须是该域的客服 (m.from_id = #{userId} AND u_to.service_domain_id = #{serviceDomainId} AND u_to.user_type_id = 1) ) OR ( -- 情况2: 客服发给我(用户) -> 发送者(u_from)必须是该域的客服 (m.to_id = #{userId} AND u_from.service_domain_id = #{serviceDomainId} AND u_from.user_type_id = 1) ) OR ( -- 【情况3】: 我自己发给自己的系统消息 -- 这里的 m.service_domain_id 是消息表自带的，绝对有值，不会因为用户身份而为空 (m.from_id = #{userId} AND m.to_id = #{userId} AND m.service_domain_id = #{serviceDomainId}) ) ) AND m.create_time >= #{startDate} ORDER BY m.create_time DESC, m.id DESC
SELECT ID, FROM_ID, TO_ID, CONTENT, CREATE_TIME, MESSAGE_TYPE_ID, CONVERSATION_ID, STATE, SERVICE_DOMAIN_ID FROM private_msg_content WHERE id = #{id}
